creator: ps.ports@smyrak.com
text:
There is a hidden dependency in the tarball on devel/appstream port (actually appstreamcli program from it). Aoki-san, if you install devel/appstream, the build should go through. 

I suspect, the issue is not visible in the default build, since one of Brasero deps (likely audio/libcanberra-gtk3) pulls the devel/appstream in.
